host: soroban-sdk test host (native Rust, not WASM)

claim_payroll.description: CPU instructions for claim_payroll with N elapsed payroll periods (single transfer, O(1) in backlog size)

batch_claim_milestones.description: CPU instructions for batch_claim_milestones with N approved milestones. Baseline bumped 2026-07-21 after #834 (operation-specific multisig thresholds) added a per-call threshold lookup, pushing n=20 ~6.2% over the prior baseline.
